_nota: PLACEHOLDER de demonstração (4 Pokémon). Corre `dart run tool/generate_dataset.dart` para gerar o dataset completo (~1025+).

pokemon.name: Bulbasaur
pokemon.description: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this Pokémon.

pokemon.name: Charmander
pokemon.description: Obviously prefers hot places. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

pokemon.name: Squirtle
pokemon.description: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. It sprays foam from its mouth.

pokemon.name: Pikachu
pokemon.description: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity can cause lightning storms.
